ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a Cypher query?'})-[r1:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: 'cypher'}),
    p2 = (u:User {uuid: 123})-[r2:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (a:Answer {uuid: 456})-[r3:PROVIDED]->(u)-[r4:ANSWERED]->(q)-[r5:COMMENTED_ON]->(c:Comment {uuid: 789})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What impact does the tag "cypher" have on the engagement metrics of the question "How to build a Cypher query," specifically for the user with UUID 123, and how does the accepted answer (UUID 456) shape the discussion around it?

cypher: MATCH (u:User {uuid: 123})-[:ASKED]->(q:Question {title: "How to build a Cypher query"}), (a:Answer {uuid: 456})-[:ANSWERED]->(q)\nMATCH (q)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "cypher"})\nRETURN q.view_count AS impact_on_engagement, a.score AS discussion_shape
